creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
Update graphics/opencolorio to conform to changes to LICENSE settings

diff -Nru opencolorio.orig/Makefile opencolorio/Makefile
--- opencolorio.orig/Makefile	2014-08-06 23:37:00.126463154 +0930
+++ opencolorio/Makefile	2014-08-03 18:37:03.244463816 +0930
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@
 MAINTAINER?=	FreeBSD@Shaneware.biz
 COMMENT?=	Complete color management solution
 
-LICENSE=	BSD
+LICENSE=	BSD3CLAUSE
 
 USE_GITHUB=	yes
 GH_ACCOUNT=	imageworks
